mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, gender, avatar, dept_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, gender, avatar, dept_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, avatar = #{avatar}, dept_id = #{deptId}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, update_by = 'system' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_by = 'system' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
